title: TeachOn Function
description: TeachOn function is only used in the background task.
see_also:
Returns the Teach mode status.

ErrorOn

EStopOn

SafetyOn

Xqt

TeachOn Function Example

The following example monitors the controller as it starts in Teach mode, and turns On/Off the I/O.

Function BGMain

  Do

    Wait 0.1

    If TeachOn = True Then

      On teachBit

    Else

      Off teachBit

    EndIf

  Loop

Fend
